task_completion.description: Create a forensic case with the specified name and case number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing the creation of a case named 'Evidence_Packaging_2024' with case number 'INV-EXT-007', or terminal commands creating the corresponding case structure.

task_completion.description: Add the suspect's USB drive image to the forensic case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI or terminal output showing the disk image '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd' being loaded or analyzed as a data source.

task_completion.description: Extract all regular files (allocated and deleted) to the specified extraction directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal (e.g., using 'ls') showing multiple extracted files populated inside the '/home/ga/Reports/extracted_evidence/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a pipe-delimited evidence manifest with file hashes and metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., 'cat') displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/evidence_manifest.txt'. It must include the exact header 'ITEM_NO|FILENAME|ORIGINAL_PATH|ALLOC_STATUS|SIZE_BYTES|MD5|SHA256|EXTRACTION_PATH' and rows of extracted file data with computed hashes.

task_completion.description: Generate a packaging summary document with case details and extraction statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying '/home/ga/Reports/packaging_summary.txt'. The content must include the case name, case number, source image path, source image MD5, file counts (allocated/deleted), total bytes, extraction directory, and examiner name 'Forensic Analyst'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine forensic tool (like Autopsy or Sleuth Kit) to process the disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Autopsy GUI or Sleuth Kit terminal commands (e.g., fls, icat, tsk_recover) rather than just a script fabricating the output files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually computed the MD5 and SHA-256 hashes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history showing hash commands (e.g., md5sum, sha256sum) or forensic tool hash generation screens, ensuring hashes aren't just placeholder text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just write the text files without extracting the evidence.
integrity.visual_evidence: The directory '/home/ga/Reports/extracted_evidence/' must be visible in at least one screenshot containing actual files, proving the extraction step was not skipped.
